name: @speedora/analytics-report
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): account-wide Analytics Report. Holds the pure aggregation functions moved from apps/api/src/analytics (analytics/performance/fusion-signal-analytics .util.ts) plus buildAnalyticsReportData, the orchestrator that assembles a full AnalyticsReportData from already-fetched, narrowed data - never queries Prisma, never renders PDF itself. Exists so apps/worker (which cannot import from apps/api) can reuse the exact same computation apps/api's AnalyticsService uses for the live dashboard - see root ARCHITECTURE.md.
